executive_summary: The account @test_handle is assessed with low confidence as potentially inauthentic based on limited available data and preliminary behavioral analysis.

key_findings.finding: Account exhibits posting patterns inconsistent with typical organic user behavior, including regular 10-minute intervals between posts.

evidence.reference: Posting interval analysis shows regular 10-minute gaps between posts over a 7-day observation period

cannot_determine: Account operator identity or organizational affiliation

methodology.data_collection: Twitter/X API v2 — limited to 7-day window
